data.content: Plan: add output-specific conditional sections for branch, commit, and live_deployment targets in all three action prompt templates (implementation, implementation_review, shipment). Verify rendering pipeline has no global fallback (already correct). Update loom_compat_bundle assertions. ~55 new lines across 4 files. Low complexity. Depends on c8f4 for target type definitions but prompt work is independent. No code changes during planning.
